'''Arastide''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented [[Gantho]] in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]]. He was a member of the [[Senate Defense Council/Legends|Defense Council]].

{{Char-stub}}
